headline: Assessing Dell Technologies (DELL) Valuation After Historic AI Server Growth And Upgraded Guidance
summary: Dell Technologies (DELL) is in focus after reporting historic quarterly results, with revenue and earnings far ahead of expectations, very large AI server growth, and a sharply higher full year revenue outlook. See our latest analysis for Dell Technologies. Despite a sharp pullback in the last week, with the 1 day and 7 day share price returns both down around 6%, Dell’s 30 day share price return of 65% and year to date share price return above 200% highlight powerful momentum built around...
